buttons may help screen reader users understand the purpose of the input button. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/input-button-name">Learn more about input buttons</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="input-image-alt"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>&lt;input type="image"&gt;</code> elements have <code>[alt]</code> text</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>When an image is being used as an <code>&lt;input&gt;</code> button, providing alternative text can help screen reader users understand the purpose of the button. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/input-image-alt">Learn about input image alt text</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="link-in-text-block"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Links are distinguishable without relying on color.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. Link text that is discernible improves the experience for users with low vision. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/link-in-text-block">Learn how to make links distinguishable</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="meta-refresh"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>The document does not use <code>&lt;meta http-equiv="refresh"&gt;</code></span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Users do not expect a page to refresh automatically, and doing so will move focus back to the top of the page. This may create a frustrating or confusing experience. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/meta-refresh">Learn more about the refresh meta tag</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="meta-viewport"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>[user-scalable="no"]</code> is not used in the <code>&lt;meta name="viewport"&gt;</code> element and the <code>[maximum-scale]</code> attribute is not less than 5.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Disabling zooming is problematic for users with low vision who rely on screen magnification to properly see the contents of a web page. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/meta-viewport">Learn more about the viewport meta tag</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="object-alt"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>&lt;object&gt;</code> elements have alternate text</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>Screen readers cannot translate non-text content. Adding alternate text to <code>&lt;object&gt;</code> elements helps screen readers convey meaning to users. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/object-alt"><span>Learn more about alt text for <code>object</code> elements</span></a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="select-name"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Select elements have associated label elements.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Form elements without effective labels can create frustrating experiences for screen reader users. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/select-name"><span>Learn more about the <code>select</code> element</span></a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="skip-link"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Skip links are focusable.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Including a skip link can help users skip to the main content to save time. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/skip-link">Learn more about skip links</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="th-has-data-cells"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>&lt;th&gt;</code> elements and elements with <code>[role="columnheader"/"rowheader"]</code> have data cells they describe.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Screen readers have features to make navigating tables easier. Ensuring table headers always refer to some set of cells may improve the experience for screen reader users. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/th-has-data-cells">Learn more about table headers</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="valid-lang"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>[lang]</code> attributes have a valid value</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Specifying a valid <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://www.w3.org/International/questions/qa-choosing-language-tags#question">BCP 47 language</a> on elements helps ensure that text is pronounced correctly by a screen reader. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/valid-lang"><span>Learn how to use the <code>lang</code> attribute</span></a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="video-caption"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>&lt;video&gt;</code> elements contain a <code>&lt;track&gt;</code> element with <code>[kind="captions"]</code></span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>When a video provides a caption it is easier for deaf and hearing impaired users to access its information. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/video-caption">Learn more about video captions</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="autocomplete-valid"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span><code>autocomplete</code> attributes are used correctly</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>The <code>autocomplete</code> attribute values must be valid and correctly applied for screen readers to function correctly. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/autocomplete-valid">Learn more about valid autocomplete values</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="presentation-role-conflict"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Elements with <code>role="none"</code> or <code>role="presentation"</code> do not have conflicts</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>There are certain cases where the semantic role of an element with <code>role="none"</code> or <code>role="presentation"</code> does not resolve to none or presentation. To ensure the element remains removed from the accessibility tree, you should not add any global ARIA attributes to the element or make it focusable. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/presentation-role-conflict">Learn more about presentation role conflict</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="svg-img-alt"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>SVG elements with an <code>img</code> role have an accessible text alternative</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>Ensures SVG elements with an <code>img</code>, <code>graphics-document</code> or <code>graphics-symbol</code> role have an accessible text alternative. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/svg-img-alt">Learn more about SVG alt text</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="table-duplicate-name"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Tables have different content in the summary attribute and <code>&lt;caption&gt;</code>.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>The summary attribute should describe the table structure, while <code>&lt;caption&gt;</code> should have the onscreen title. Accurate table mark-up helps users of screen readers. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/table-duplicate-name">Learn more about summary and caption</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="empty-heading"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>All heading elements contain content.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>A heading with no content or inaccessible text prevent screen reader users from accessing information on the page's structure. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/empty-heading">Learn more about headings</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="aria-allowed-role"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Uses ARIA roles only on compatible elements</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Many HTML elements can only be assigned certain ARIA roles. Using ARIA roles where they are not allowed can interfere with the accessibility of the web page. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/aria-allowed-role">Learn more about ARIA roles</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="image-redundant-alt"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Image elements do not have <code>[alt]</code> attributes that are redundant text.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Informative elements should aim for short, descriptive alternative text. Alternative text that is exactly the same as the text adjacent to the link or image is potentially confusing for screen reader users, because the text will be read twice. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/image-redundant-alt"><span>Learn more about the <code>alt</code> attribute</span></a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--notapplicable lh-audit--pass" id="identical-links-same-purpose"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Identical links have the same purpose.</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Links with the same destination should have the same description, to help users understand the link's purpose and decide whether to follow it. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/identical-links-same-purpose">Learn more about identical links</a>.</span><span class="lh-audit__adorn" title="This audit does not contribute to the overall category score.">Unscored</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> </details> </div></details> </div></div></div><div class="lh-category-wrapper"><div class="lh-category" class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>The <code>X-Frame-Options</code> (XFO) header or the <code>frame-ancestors</code> directive in the <code>Content-Security-Policy</code> (CSP) header control href="https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/best-practices/clickjacking-mitigation?utm_source=lighthouse&amp;utm_medium=lr">Learn more about mitigating clickjacking</a>.</span><span lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Uses HTTPS</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line class="lh-audit__description"><span>All sites should be protected with HTTPS, even ones that don't handle sensitive data. This includes avoiding <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/security/prevent-mixed-content/what-is-mixed-content?utm_source=lighthouse&amp;utm_medium=lr">mixed content</a>, where some resources are loaded over HTTP despite the initial request being served over HTTPS. HTTPS prevents intruders from tampering with or passively listening in on the communications between your app and your users, and is a prerequisite for HTTP/2 and many new web platform APIs. <a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/pwa/is-on-https/?utm_source=lighthouse&amp;utm_medium=lr">Learn more about HTTPS</a>.</span></div> <div class="lh-audit__title"><span>Links are crawlable</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span><span>Search engines may use <code>href</code> attributes on links to crawl websites. Ensure that the <code>href</code> attribute of anchor elements links to an appropriate destination, so more pages of the site can be discovered. </span><a rel="noopener" target="_blank" href="https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9112205">Learn how to make links crawlable</a></span></div> <div class="lh-audit__stackpacks"></div> <span class="lh-details"></span></details> </div><div class="lh-audit lh-audit--binary lh-audit--pass" id="image-alt"> <details class="lh-expandable-details"> <summary> <div class="lh-audit__header lh-expandable-details__summary"> <span class="lh-audit__score-icon"></span> <span class="lh-audit__title-and-text"> <span class="lh-audit__title"><span>Image elements have <code>[alt]</code> attributes</span></span> <span class="lh-audit__display-text"></span> </span> <div class="lh-chevron-container"><svg class="lh-chevron" viewBox="0 0 100 100"> <g class="lh-chevron__lines"> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-left" d="M10 50h40"></path> <path class="lh-chevron__line lh-chevron__line-right" d="M90 50H50"></path> </g> </svg></div> </div> </summary> <div class="lh-audit__description"><span>Informative elements should aim for short, descriptive alternate text.
